Hardware Component File

N_P33A_EPS_UDS_PT_20201022

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_P33A_EPS_UDS_PT_20201022_20201022T073434.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 742
Receive ID 762
Functional Addr 04
Functional Name EPS
